// note: airspeed-velocity config for regression-over-time benchmarking (issue 0019, ADR-0006). The benchmark suite lives in benchmarks/ and times araclean against itself across commits, so a future throughput regression is detectable. The snapshot-in-time comparison vs pyarabic lives in the pytest-benchmark tests. Run with `uv run asv run` / `uv run asv continuous`; validate with `uv run asv check -E existing`.
// build: araclean builds with hatchling (PEP 517). asv's default install command references a {wheel_file} produced by a separate build step; we skip that and let pip build+install straight from the checked-out source tree, so there is no wheel to substitute. Keeps the asv setup independent of any wheel-staging dance.
